<!-- GENERATED by cmd/gendocs from internal/inspect/registry.go. Do not edit by hand; run `make docs-gen`. -->

Object inspectors report the distribution of frontmatter fields — presence, types, values, ranges.

Inspectors in this family:

- [Field Frequency]({{< relref "field-frequency.md" >}}) — Report, per frontmatter key, how many files contain it.
- [Field Types]({{< relref "field-types.md" >}}) — Report, per key, the histogram of observed value types.
- [Field Values]({{< relref "field-values.md" >}}) — Report, per key, value cardinality and a small value set when it looks like an enum.
- [Field Numeric Range]({{< relref "field-numeric-range.md" >}}) — Report the observed min and max of numeric fields.
- [Field String Length]({{< relref "field-string-length.md" >}}) — Report the observed min and max length of string fields.
